top_signals.title: Oil prices fall as investors continue to watch U.S.-Iran moves, Citi sees 'overhang' disappearing
top_signals.summary: Oil falls Tuesday as investors continue to assess the latest developments in the Middle East, while showing optimism the conflict may end soon.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CNBC Daily Open: Tech-tonic shift or buying opportunity?
top_signals.summary: Wall Street returns to trading with a big-cap technology sell-off, triggering broader declines across global markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Korean Stocks Tumble 10% From Record, Triggering Trading Halt
top_signals.summary: South Korean stocks tumbled from a record high as investors sold off chip heavyweights on renewed concern that the rally has become overstretched.

top_signals.title: Wolves deal Julius Randle to Nets in three-team trade
top_signals.summary: Minnesota dealt ‌Randle and ‌the 28th overall pick in the Tuesday ​draft to the Nets for the 33rd overall selection, while Brooklyn sent center Nic Claxton to the ⁠Bulls.
